title: AI bubble debate gets real as chip stocks rally
description: Chipmaker stocks are soaring, leading to a debate about an artificial intelligence bubble. Demand for AI data center chips is driving prices up significantly. Companies like Micron, SK Hynix, and Samsung Electronics are seeing massive gains. Investors are watching closely, weighing the potential for sustained growth against the industry's historical volatility. This surge is crucial for overall market performance.
content:
Chipmakers are by far the hottest stocks in the market, but their recent surge is lending urgency to the debate over whether investors are buying into an artificial-intelligence bubble that's due to burst.

title: New plan to boost Thais' AI awareness
description: The proposed TH-AI Passport project has become one of the most debated digital policy initiatives in recent years. Framed as a national investment in human capital and artificial intelligence capability, the scheme has drawn scrutiny over its scale, procurement process and value for money.

title: The Week in Breakingviews: The AI backlash arrives

title: PhysicsWallah aims to grow revenue by over 30 pc this fiscal, leverage AI to cut cost
description: NEW DELHI, May 31 : Edtech firm PhysicsWallah expects to grow revenue by over 30 per cent this fiscal and leverage artificial intelligence to reduce operational expenses, a senior company official said. The company recently reported narrowing of consolidated loss to Rs 69.14 crore in the fourth quarter ended March 31, 2026 due to increase in enrolments and average revenue per person from a loss of Rs 289.27 crore in the same period a year ago. “We will continue to […]

title: Silicon Valley giant slashes more jobs in AI boom bloodbath
description: Meta has cut thousands of jobs in the Bay Area. Artificial intelligence continues to reshape the tech industry that has lost more than 140,000 jobs so far this year.
content:
The AI bloodbath continues in tech as Meta cuts thousands of jobs in Silicon Valley.

title: Defense officials want Trump to be ‘very careful’ about use of AI in military
description: The Trump administration is pushing to unleash the power of artificial intelligence for the U.S. military while facing calls to put up guardrails around the rapidly developing technology.
content:

title: New Mexico officials call for statewide plan to govern AI use in schools
description: State officials recommend a plan to govern artificial intelligence in New Mexico schools, as lawmakers debate benefits like personalized learning against risks including cheating and data privacy.
content:

title: After the AI binge, companies balk at soaring bills
description: Artificial intelligence is getting expensive -- and companies are starting to rethink their embrace of the disruptive technology.
